items.name: Headless Aura Fly Levitate Pose
items.description:
🌀Headless Aura Levitate Pose 🌀
Defy gravity and play with your own aura. ✨

A unique levitation animation where your avatar floats while tossing their head in the air and catching it with style. A mysterious and powerful aura moment that instantly makes your avatar stand out.

Perfect for edits, aura farming, idle showcases and dominating the server with pure main character energy.

Your avatar levitates calmly while controlling their floating head and radiating dark aura energy.

Perfect for:
🌀 Aura moments
✨ Aura farming edits
🌑 Dark aesthetic avatars
🔥 Sigma / main character energy
🎮 Idle showcase animations
🎥 Roblox edits & clips

Break gravity. Control the aura. Own the moment.

items.name: Nightfall Blade ┃Code - Nightfall
items.description: Forged in the heart of an ancient eclipse, the Nightfall Blade is a weapon of unmatched darkness and mystique. Its obsidian edge gleams with the whispers of shadows, striking fear into the hearts of those who dare to oppose its wielder. Infused with the power of the night, this blade not only cuts through flesh but also siphons the very essence of light from its surroundings. Legends say that those who master the Nightfall Blade can harness its true potential, casting an impenetrable shroud of darkness that engulfs their enemies in eternal night. Are you prepared to wield the power of the abyss?
